VALIDATION_SCHEMA_ERROR: Validation failed for the provided data

MIME_TYPE_MISMATCH: File content does not match the declared type
FILE_SIZE_EXCEEDED: File size exceeds the allowed limit
TOO_MANY_FILES: Too many files uploaded at once
